exact.する — 敵を押し込めば花火大会だ: — shove enemies in for a fireworks show
exact.休息の連鎖がデッキを食い尽くした: A spiral of rests devoured your deck
exact.カードは握って死ぬより、使って生きる燃料だ。敵を早く減らせば、休息はそもそも要ら: Cards are fuel to live by, not to die holding. Kill faster and you won't need to rest at all
exact.浅い傷は装甲(HP)で受けろ。HPは補給で戻るが、燃えたカードは永遠に戻らない: Take shallow hits on the hull. HP comes back at resupply — burned cards never do
exact.燃料に投じたカードが多すぎた: Too many cards went into the fuel tank
exact.跳ぶ前に残カード数を見ろ。寿命10枚のうち燃料に回せるのは2枚が限度だ: Check your card count before leaping. Of a 10-card lifespan, two is all you can spare for fuel
exact.全カード喪失 — 寿命が敵に届く前に燃え尽きた: All cards lost — your lifespan burned out before it reached the enemy
exact.1ターンで必ず2枚減る。毎ターン、ダメージか位置の利のどちらかに変換し続けろ: Every turn costs two cards, no exceptions. Convert each one into damage or position, every single turn
exact.全弾を船体で受けた末の轟沈: Sank taking every hit on the hull
exact.致命打はカード1枚で無効化できる(手札か消耗から)。船体は通貨、カードは保険 —: A lethal hit can be negated with one card (hand or discard). Hull is currency, cards are insurance — learn to exchange
exact.船体大破 — 深淵の圧が上回った: Hull shattered — the abyss pressed harder
exact.敵の予告(赤マス)から1歩ずれるだけで大半は空振りする。移動の上半分は回避の道具: One step off the telegraphed red tiles and most attacks whiff. The top half of a card is a dodging tool
exact.手を離した分、随伴機の整備が進んだ(HP+1): Letting go freed up hands — drone maintenance done (HP+1)
exact.残骸の熱: この戦域中は強化(+)相当: Wreck heat: counts as upgraded (+) for this sector
exact.🛞 姿勢制御 — 1マスだけ身をよじれる: 🛞 Attitude control — one tile of wiggle room
exact.エンジンは休んでいても、姿勢制御スラスタは生きている。: The engine may be resting, but the RCS thrusters are alive.
exact.敵の予告から身をずらす、最後の機会だ。: Your last chance to slip out of the telegraphs.
exact.同じ荷のまま次のボスで帰還なら: Return at the next boss with the same cargo:
exact.(これから拾う分は上積み): (everything you pick up is on top)
exact.不動。十字に充填→焼却を繰り返し、合間に機雷を産み落とす。直撃は交点のみ2、翼は: Immobile. Charges a cross, then burns it, laying mines in between. Only the intersection hits for 2 — the wings graze for 1. Escape half, save half
exact.敵の攻撃を敵に当てさせる: Make an enemy hit an enemy
exact.カードを燃やして致命打を消す: Burn a card to negate a lethal hit
exact.太陽フレアで敵を始末: Finish an enemy with a solar flare
exact.重力渦に敵を呑ませる: Feed an enemy to the gravity well
exact.目を閉じさせた者: The One Who Closed the Eye
exact.中心墓所の主を討つ: Slay the master of the Central Tomb
exact.ボスを討って生きて帰る: Slay a boss and come home alive
exact.深度倍率x2以上で生きて帰る: Return alive at depth multiplier x2+
exact.瞬間図鑑 — 深淵で起きうるドラマの収集録:: Moment Codex — a collection of every drama the abyss can stage:

rules: ^被弾(\d+)発をカードで打ち消した — 寿命の前借り$
Negated $1 hits with cards — borrowing against your lifespan
^残骸の熱が移った — 『(.+)』はこの戦域中\+扱いだ$
The wreck's heat transferred — “$1” counts as + for this sector
^(.+)は十字の翼を掠めただけだ\(半減\)$
^(.+) が姿勢制御で1マス退避 — エンジンは死んでいても、身はよじれる$
$1 slips one tile on attitude control — the engine is dead, but the body can twist
^姿勢制御: (.+)を(.+)\((\d+),(\d+)\)へ1マス退避\(慣性そのまま・敵の予告から身をずらせ\)$
Attitude control: shift $1 $2 to ($3,$4) — drift unchanged, slip the telegraphs
^(旗艦|随伴機)を\((\d+),(\d+)\)へ。ドリフトは変わらない$
^🏆 瞬間図鑑 (\d+)/(\d+) — 深淵はまだ全部の顔を見せていない$
🏆 Moment Codex $1/$2 — the abyss hasn't shown you all its faces yet
